message:
feat(sync): atomic merge transactions with in-tx storage methods

Wrap all merge-apply operations (deletions, upserts, label/dep/comment
sync, child-counter rebuild) inside a single storage.mutate() call so
the entire merge is atomic. If any step fails (e.g., external parent-child
link validation), both deletions and partial imports are rolled back.

Extract apply_merge_report() from inline sync logic. Split five storage
methods into _in_tx variants accepting raw &Connection for composition
inside existing transactions:
- upsert_issue_for_import_in_tx
- sync_labels_for_import_in_tx
- sync_dependencies_for_import_in_tx (now rejects self-dependencies)
- sync_comments_for_import_in_tx (handles duplicate comment IDs)
- tombstone_issue_in_tx (returns Ok(false) for absent rows)

New test: apply_merge_report_is_atomic_when_relation_sync_fails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
